mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_audit_task WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY step_order ASC, create_time ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed FROM sys_audit_task WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= #{yearStart} AND create_time <= #{yearEnd}
